---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.hero-banner}

<div class="hero-title">Evidence Surveillance Repository</div>

<div class="hero-subtitle">
A live website demonstrating how living evidence surveillance outputs can be published through a searchable, downloadable, and version-controlled platform.
</div>
:::

::: {.status-box}
**Status:** This website represents a repository Evidence Surveillance products created by the Evidence Synthesis team at the Public Health Agency of Canada. Should you need to get in touch with a member of our team regarding these products, please contact:
**evidence.synthesis-synthese.de.donnees.probantes@phac-aspc.gc.ca.**
:::

{{< include _recent-updates.md >}}

## Purpose

The Evidence Surveillance Repository provides a simple and sustainable approach for sharing rapidly updated outbreak literature.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Searchable evidence

Users can browse and filter references by outbreak, study design, and year.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Downloadable data

The underlying dataset can be downloaded as a CSV for reuse by researchers and public health professionals.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Version history

GitHub tracks changes over time, supporting transparency and reproducibility.
:::
